attributes.description: Query engine efficiency and data access performance. Are applications using the database efficiently? Is the buffer cache effective?

query.esql:
TS metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE oracledb.executions IS NOT NULL
| STATS exec_rate = SUM(RATE(oracledb.executions)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE oracledb.executions IS NOT NULL
| STATS exec_rate = SUM(RATE(oracledb.executions)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

embeddableConfig.description: SQL execution rate per second over time.

query.esql:
TS metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE oracledb.hard_parses IS NOT NULL
| STATS hard_parse_rate = SUM(RATE(oracledb.hard_parses)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE oracledb.hard_parses IS NOT NULL
| STATS hard_parse_rate = SUM(RATE(oracledb.hard_parses)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

embeddableConfig.description: Hard parse rate per second over time.

query.esql:
TS metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE oracledb.hard_parses IS NOT NULL AND oracledb.parse_calls IS NOT NULL
| STATS hard_rate = SUM(RATE(oracledb.hard_parses)), total_rate = SUM(RATE(oracledb.parse_calls)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| EVAL ratio_pct = CASE(total_rate > 0, ROUND(hard_rate / total_rate, 3), 0.0)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE oracledb.hard_parses IS NOT NULL AND oracledb.parse_calls IS NOT NULL
| STATS hard_rate = SUM(RATE(oracledb.hard_parses)), total_rate = SUM(RATE(oracledb.parse_calls)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| EVAL ratio_pct = CASE(total_rate > 0, ROUND(hard_rate / total_rate, 3), 0.0)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

embeddableConfig.description: Hard parse ratio trend over time.

query.esql:
TS metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE oracledb.physical_reads IS NOT NULL AND oracledb.logical_reads IS NOT NULL
| STATS physical_rate = SUM(RATE(oracledb.physical_reads)), logical_rate = SUM(RATE(oracledb.logical_reads)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| EVAL hit_ratio_pct = CASE(logical_rate > 0, ROUND(1 - physical_rate / logical_rate, 3), 0.0)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE oracledb.physical_reads IS NOT NULL AND oracledb.logical_reads IS NOT NULL
| STATS physical_rate = SUM(RATE(oracledb.physical_reads)), logical_rate = SUM(RATE(oracledb.logical_reads)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| EVAL hit_ratio_pct = CASE(logical_rate > 0, ROUND(1 - physical_rate / logical_rate, 3), 0.0)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

attributes.title: Buffer Cache Hit Ratio Over Time

embeddableConfig.description: Buffer cache hit ratio trend over time.

query.esql:
TS metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE oracledb.logical_reads IS NOT NULL
| STATS logical_rate = SUM(RATE(oracledb.logical_reads)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE oracledb.logical_reads IS NOT NULL
| STATS logical_rate = SUM(RATE(oracledb.logical_reads)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

embeddableConfig.description: Logical read (buffer cache access) rate per second over time.

query.esql:
TS metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE oracledb.physical_reads IS NOT NULL
| STATS physical_rate = SUM(RATE(oracledb.physical_reads)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE oracledb.physical_reads IS NOT NULL
| STATS physical_rate = SUM(RATE(oracledb.physical_reads)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

embeddableConfig.description: Physical read (disk I/O) rate per second over time.

query.esql:
TS metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE oracledb.cpu_time IS NOT NULL
| STATS cpu_rate = SUM(RATE(oracledb.cpu_time)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE oracledb.cpu_time IS NOT NULL
| STATS cpu_rate = SUM(RATE(oracledb.cpu_time)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

embeddableConfig.description: Cumulative CPU time consumption rate (seconds of CPU per second of wall clock) over time.

query.esql:
TS metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE oracledb.pga_memory IS NOT NULL
| STATS pga = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(oracledb.pga_memory)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE oracledb.pga_memory IS NOT NULL
| STATS pga = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(oracledb.pga_memory)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

embeddableConfig.description: Aggregate PGA memory allocation trend over time.

query.esql:
TS metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE oracledb.parse_calls IS NOT NULL
| STATS parse_rate = SUM(RATE(oracledb.parse_calls)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE oracledb.parse_calls IS NOT NULL
| STATS parse_rate = SUM(RATE(oracledb.parse_calls)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

embeddableConfig.description: Total parse call rate (soft + hard parses) per second over time.

query.esql:
TS metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE oracledb.cpu_time IS NOT NULL OR oracledb.executions IS NOT NULL
| STATS cpu_rate = SUM(RATE(oracledb.cpu_time)), exec_rate = SUM(RATE(oracledb.executions))
| EVAL cpu_per_exec = CASE(exec_rate > 0, cpu_rate / exec_rate, 0.0)

TS metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE oracledb.cpu_time IS NOT NULL OR oracledb.executions IS NOT NULL
| STATS cpu_rate = SUM(RATE(oracledb.cpu_time)), exec_rate = SUM(RATE(oracledb.executions))
| EVAL cpu_per_exec = CASE(exec_rate > 0, cpu_rate / exec_rate, 0.0)

embeddableConfig.description: Average CPU seconds consumed per SQL execution.

query.esql:
TS metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE oracledb.cpu_time IS NOT NULL OR oracledb.executions IS NOT NULL
| STATS cpu_rate = SUM(RATE(oracledb.cpu_time)), exec_rate = SUM(RATE(oracledb.executions))
| EVAL cpu_per_exec = CASE(exec_rate > 0, cpu_rate / exec_rate, 0.0)

TS metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE oracledb.executions IS NOT NULL
| STATS exec_rate = SUM(RATE(oracledb.executions))

TS metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE oracledb.executions IS NOT NULL
| STATS exec_rate = SUM(RATE(oracledb.executions))

embeddableConfig.description: SQL statements executed per second, including both user and recursive (internal) calls.

query.esql:
TS metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE oracledb.executions IS NOT NULL
| STATS exec_rate = SUM(RATE(oracledb.executions))

TS metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE oracledb.hard_parses IS NOT NULL AND oracledb.parse_calls IS NOT NULL
| STATS hard_rate = SUM(RATE(oracledb.hard_parses)), total_rate = SUM(RATE(oracledb.parse_calls))
| EVAL ratio_pct = CASE(total_rate > 0, ROUND(hard_rate / total_rate, 3), 0.0)

TS metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE oracledb.hard_parses IS NOT NULL AND oracledb.parse_calls IS NOT NULL
| STATS hard_rate = SUM(RATE(oracledb.hard_parses)), total_rate = SUM(RATE(oracledb.parse_calls))
| EVAL ratio_pct = CASE(total_rate > 0, ROUND(hard_rate / total_rate, 3), 0.0)

embeddableConfig.description: Proportion of parse calls that required full SQL compilation (hard parse) versus reusing a cached plan (soft parse).

query.esql:
TS metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE oracledb.hard_parses IS NOT NULL AND oracledb.parse_calls IS NOT NULL
| STATS hard_rate = SUM(RATE(oracledb.hard_parses)), total_rate = SUM(RATE(oracledb.parse_calls))
| EVAL ratio_pct = CASE(total_rate > 0, ROUND(hard_rate / total_rate, 3), 0.0)

TS metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE oracledb.physical_reads IS NOT NULL AND oracledb.logical_reads IS NOT NULL
| STATS physical_rate = SUM(RATE(oracledb.physical_reads)), logical_rate = SUM(RATE(oracledb.logical_reads))
| EVAL hit_ratio_pct = CASE(logical_rate > 0, ROUND(1 - physical_rate / logical_rate, 3), 0.0)

TS metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE oracledb.physical_reads IS NOT NULL AND oracledb.logical_reads IS NOT NULL
| STATS physical_rate = SUM(RATE(oracledb.physical_reads)), logical_rate = SUM(RATE(oracledb.logical_reads))
| EVAL hit_ratio_pct = CASE(logical_rate > 0, ROUND(1 - physical_rate / logical_rate, 3), 0.0)

embeddableConfig.description: Proportion of data block reads served from the SGA buffer cache versus disk.

query.esql:
TS metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE oracledb.physical_reads IS NOT NULL AND oracledb.logical_reads IS NOT NULL
| STATS physical_rate = SUM(RATE(oracledb.physical_reads)), logical_rate = SUM(RATE(oracledb.logical_reads))
| EVAL hit_ratio_pct = CASE(logical_rate > 0, ROUND(1 - physical_rate / logical_rate, 3), 0.0)

TS metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE oracledb.pga_memory IS NOT NULL
| STATS pga = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(oracledb.pga_memory))

TS metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE oracledb.pga_memory IS NOT NULL
| STATS pga = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(oracledb.pga_memory))

embeddableConfig.description: Current aggregate PGA (Program Global Area) memory allocated across all sessions.

query.esql:
TS metrics-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE oracledb.pga_memory IS NOT NULL
| STATS pga = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(oracledb.pga_memory))

embeddableConfig.content:
# Oracle Database - SQL execution, I/O & Cache performance

This dashboard offers insights into query engine efficiency and data access performance for your Oracle Database instance, including

- SQL execution rate and CPU time per execution
- Hard parse ratio and parse call throughput
- Buffer cache hit ratio effectiveness over time
- Logical and physical read rates
- PGA memory allocation and trends
- CPU time consumption rate

attributes.title: [Metrics Oracle] SQL Execution, I/O & Cache Performance
